assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking compatibility matrix and verifying Istio 1.32 supports GKE 1.32 with specific commands and reference to Istio documentation

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Explicitly includes checking the Istio compatibility matrix with command to verify Istio 1.32 supports GKE 1.32 and references the official Istio supported releases documentation

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response shows upgrading GKE control plane first (Phase 1) then Istio (Phase 3), but doesn't explicitly advise upgrading Istio first when current version doesn't support target k8s version

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response mentions sidecar injection and provides monitoring commands but doesn't explain the mutating webhook mechanism or potential issues during node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to monitor sidecar injection and check proxy versions, plus mentions rolling restart to pick up new sidecars

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check proxy versions and monitor sidecar version consistency, including a command to check for mixed sidecar versions

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple istioctl and kubectl commands to check versions, proxy status, and configuration including 'istioctl analyze' and proxy version checks

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response specifically addresses sidecar version mismatch as a common gotcha and provides solutions, plus recommends gradual rollout to avoid issues
